# zendesk_trigger_category (Data Source)

Look up a Zendesk trigger category by name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the trigger category.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the trigger category.
